overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, transitioning from a covered street to an illuminated pedestrian arcade, ascending stairs past digital billboards, and emerging into an upper commercial plaza. The footage is from a video game engine with cinematic quality and vibrant neon lighting.

approaching the entrance to the covered pedestrian walkway

tall building with large red neon signage reading 'TSUKI CYBERNETICS'

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered urban street at night, moving forward alongside yellow road barriers. A red sports car passes by on the right as the camera approaches the entrance to a pedestrian walkway, with the illuminated Tsuki Cybernetics building visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway with reflective tiled flooring and bright overhead lighting. Vending machines and digital advertisements line the path as a pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. The Tsuki Cybernetics building remains visible to the left.

turning right toward the stairway entrance at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the long corridor as the ambient lighting shifts colors

entered.detail: long rectangular ceiling panels emitting colored light along the corridor
rectangular planters with green foliage lining the right wall
wide staircase leading upward with illuminated edges visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a long corridor with reflective flooring and planter boxes along the right wall. The ceiling panels gradually shift from cyan to red lighting. The camera turns toward a wide stairway entrance at the end of the corridor.

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide illuminated stairway
passing close by a person with blue hair descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs toward the upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: woman with blue hair in white outfit descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with purple and cyan neon lighting along the edges
metal handrails with integrated cyan neon lighting
large illuminated sign with 'KENDACHI' text visible on the right building

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide stairway illuminated with purple and cyan neon lights. A woman with blue hair walks down the stairs in the opposite direction. The Kendachi sign becomes visible on the right as the camera climbs toward the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level commercial plaza with large digital advertisements

events.description: emerging from stairs into open plaza with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead toward the building entrance

entered.detail: wide open tiled plaza with reflective wet surfaces
large digital billboard displaying 'DYNALAR' and cybernetic hand imagery
tall building with red neon signage reading 'FUYUTSUKI ELECTRONICS'

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs into an open upper-level plaza with wet reflective flooring. Large digital billboards for Kendachi, Fuyutsuki Electronics, and Dynalar dominate the surroundings. The camera walks toward a building entrance as other pedestrians move through the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a covered urban street into a vibrant, neon-drenched upper-level commercial plaza. It begins by moving past yellow road barriers and a passing red sports car toward the entrance of a pedestrian walkway, with the illuminated Tsuki Cybernetics building looming in the distance. As the camera enters the walkway, the environment shifts to a corridor of reflective tiled flooring and digital advertisements, where the overhead lighting gradually transitions from cyan to red. The scene then moves toward a wide stairway, ascending through purple and cyan neon glows past a blue-haired pedestrian and a Kendachi sign. Finally, the camera emerges onto an open upper plaza with wet, reflective ground, moving through a crowd of pedestrians toward a building entrance beneath massive digital billboards for Kendachi, Fuyutsuki Electronics, and Dynalar.
